title: Fresh MythicBotany & Botania
description: A new look at the MythicBotany & Botania
body:
# ⭐ MythicBotany ReTexture Pack

I'm excited to present my new texture pack, specially designed to enhance the textures of the MythicBotany mod! If you love the mythical adventures and magical artifacts of this wonderful mod but want them to fit better with the classic Minecraft style, this texture pack is just for you!

![New update ver. 1.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6014b76375c4be307f9552f616b92123f8ba349b.gif)

### Main Features:
- **Enhanced Textures**: Most of the textures in the MythicBotany mod have been carefully reworked to blend seamlessly with the original Minecraft textures.
- **Vanilla Style**: The original spirit of the game is preserved, allowing you to enjoy your favorite mods without losing the classic Minecraft atmosphere.

### Attention!
Obviously, you'll need **Botania** and **MythicBotany**
